commit_queue.commit_subject: docs(plan): unified eef completion plan absorbs round-1 + round-2 review findings

claims.intent: Retire smoke-tests directory + vitest.smoke.config.ts + smoke:* scripts (cycles 1a-1d); add proper unit/integration replacement for dev-server-boots coverage (cycle 1c); claim cycle 2 audit areas separately at start; author no-real-io-in-tests ESLint rule (cycle 3, root-config wire-up gated on cycle 2 close).
claims.notes: Parallel-safe with Fronded Climbing Thicket (plan 2 SENTRY_MODE rename). File-level independent — no overlap with packages/core/env/, packages/core/observability/, packages/libs/sentry-node/, packages/libs/env-resolution/, or apps/*/src/observability/, apps/*/src/env.ts, apps/*/src/lib/env.ts, apps/*/src/runtime-config*.ts. Cycle 2 audit areas (packages/core, libs, sdks, apps/oak-search-cli, agent-tools) will be claimed separately at cycle 2 start.

claims.intent: Unified-plan execution opener: hygiene-first under no-speed-pressure (thread-record refresh + identity register + claim) then architecture-led review pass over plan body AND code surface. Reviewer dispatch: code-reviewer (gateway) + architecture-reviewer-{barney,betty,fred,wilma} + assumptions-reviewer over (a) feat-eef-exploration-completion.plan.md, (b) commits fd4eabaa..b226670d delta, (c) .agent/rules/no-speed-pressure.md, (d) observability/env package areas the plan touches. Specialists escalated by findings, not pre-dispatched. Cycle 2/3 file areas will be claimed separately at execution time.
claims.notes: Co-active with Moonlit Shimmering Comet claim 8ed6386d (smoke-tests retire / cycle 1a-1d landed; freshness window ~16:43Z + 4h likely expired). Plan body claim is non-overlapping with Moonlit's smoke-tests areas. Branch feat/eef_exploration HEAD b539c7c5; clean tree at session-open.

claims.intent: Stage and commit step-2 refined plan body absorbing Round 1 + Round 2 architecture-led review findings (12-step unified plan)
claims.notes: Pathspecs: plan body + thread record + active-claims + shared-comms-log + new comms-event. Gates state: clean working tree apart from these 5 files. Peer claims: Moonlit Shimmering Comet 8ed6386d (smoke-tests retire areas, file-disjoint); Pelagic files claim 1c0622d4 (this session, files kind, non-overlapping with git:index/head).
